### [Diretório personalizado](https://opencode.ai/docs/pt-br/config#diret%C3%B3rio-personalizado)

Especifique um diretório de configuração personalizado usando a variável de ambiente `OPENCODE_CONFIG_DIR`. Este diretório será pesquisado por agentes, comandos, modos e plugins, assim como o diretório padrão `.opencode`, e deve seguir a mesma estrutura.

    export OPENCODE_CONFIG_DIR=/path/to/my/config-directoryopencode run "Hello world"

O diretório personalizado é carregado após a configuração global e os diretórios `.opencode`, então ele **pode substituir** suas configurações.

* * *

[Esquema](https://opencode.ai/docs/pt-br/config#esquema)

---------------------------------------------------------

O esquema de configuração do servidor/tempo de execução é definido em [**`opencode.ai/config.json`**](https://opencode.ai/config.json)
.

A configuração do TUI usa [**`opencode.ai/tui.json`**](https://opencode.ai/tui.json)
.

Seu editor deve ser capaz de validar e autocompletar com base no esquema.

* * *

### [TUI](https://opencode.ai/docs/pt-br/config#tui)

Use um arquivo `tui.json` (ou `tui.jsonc`) dedicado para configurações específicas do TUI.

    {  "$schema": "https://opencode.ai/tui.json",  "scroll_speed": 3,  "scroll_acceleration": {    "enabled": true  },  "diff_style": "auto"}

Use `OPENCODE_TUI_CONFIG` para apontar para um arquivo de configuração TUI personalizado.

Chaves legadas `theme`, `keybinds` e `tui` em `opencode.json` estão obsoletas e são migradas automaticamente quando possível.

[Saiba mais sobre a configuração do TUI aqui](https://opencode.ai/docs/tui#configure)
.

* * *

### [Servidor](https://opencode.ai/docs/pt-br/config#servidor)

Você pode configurar as configurações do servidor para os comandos `opencode serve` e `opencode web` através da opção `server`.

    {  "$schema": "https://opencode.ai/config.json",  "server": {    "port": 4096,    "hostname": "0.0.0.0",    "mdns": true,    "mdnsDomain": "myproject.local",    "cors": ["http://localhost:5173"]  }}

Opções disponíveis:

*   `port` - Porta para escutar.
*   `hostname` - Nome do host para escutar. Quando `mdns` está habilitado e nenhum nome de host está definido, o padrão é `0.0.0.0`.
*   `mdns` - Habilitar descoberta de serviço mDNS. Isso permite que outros dispositivos na rede descubram seu servidor opencode.
*   `mdnsDomain` - Nome de domínio personalizado para o serviço mDNS. O padrão é `opencode.local`. Útil para executar várias instâncias na mesma rede.
*   `cors` - Origens adicionais a serem permitidas para CORS ao usar o servidor HTTP de um cliente baseado em navegador. Os valores devem ser origens completas (esquema + host + porta opcional), por exemplo, `https://app.example.com`.

[Saiba mais sobre o servidor aqui](https://opencode.ai/docs/server)
.

* * *

### [Ferramentas](https://opencode.ai/docs/pt-br/config#ferramentas)

Você pode gerenciar as ferramentas que um LLM pode usar através da opção `tools`.

    {  "$schema": "https://opencode.ai/config.json",  "tools": {    "write": false,    "bash": false  }}

[Saiba mais sobre ferramentas aqui](https://opencode.ai/docs/tools)
.

* * *

### [Modelos](https://opencode.ai/docs/pt-br/config#modelos)

Você pode configurar os provedores e modelos que deseja usar em sua configuração do opencode através das opções `provider`, `model` e `small_model`.

    {  "$schema": "https://opencode.ai/config.json",  "provider": {},  "model": "anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-5",  "small_model": "anthropic/claude-haiku-4-5"}

A opção `small_model` configura um modelo separado para tarefas leves, como geração de títulos. Por padrão, o opencode tenta usar um modelo mais barato se um estiver disponível do seu provedor, caso contrário, ele recua para seu modelo principal.

As opções do provedor podem incluir `timeout` e `setCacheKey`:

    {  "$schema": "https://opencode.ai/config.json",  "provider": {    "anthropic": {      "options": {        "timeout": 600000,        "setCacheKey": true      }    }  }}

*   `timeout` - Tempo limite da solicitação em milissegundos (padrão: 300000). Defina como `false` para desabilitar.
*   `setCacheKey` - Garantir que uma chave de cache seja sempre definida para o provedor designado.

Você também pode configurar [modelos locais](https://opencode.ai/docs/models#local)
. [Saiba mais](https://opencode.ai/docs/models)
.

* * *

#### [Opções Específicas do Provedor](https://opencode.ai/docs/pt-br/config#op%C3%A7%C3%B5es-espec%C3%ADficas-do-provedor)

Alguns provedores suportam opções de configuração adicionais além das configurações genéricas `timeout` e `apiKey`.

##### [Amazon Bedrock](https://opencode.ai/docs/pt-br/config#amazon-bedrock)

Amazon Bedrock suporta configuração específica da AWS:

    {  "$schema": "https://opencode.ai/config.json",  "provider": {    "amazon-bedrock": {      "options": {        "region": "us-east-1",        "profile": "my-aws-profile",        "endpoint": "https://bedrock-runtime.us-east-1.vpce-xxxxx.amazonaws.com"      }    }  }}

*   `region` - Região AWS para Bedrock (padrão para `AWS_REGION` var de ambiente ou `us-east-1`)
*   `profile` - Perfil nomeado da AWS em `~/.aws/credentials` (padrão para `AWS_PROFILE` var de ambiente)
*   `endpoint` - URL de endpoint personalizada para endpoints VPC. Este é um alias para a opção genérica `baseURL` usando terminologia específica da AWS. Se ambos forem especificados, `endpoint` tem precedência.

[Saiba mais sobre a configuração do Amazon Bedrock](https://opencode.ai/docs/providers#amazon-bedrock)
.

* * *

### [Temas](https://opencode.ai/docs/pt-br/config#temas)

Defina seu tema de interface em `tui.json`.

    {  "$schema": "https://opencode.ai/tui.json",  "theme": "tokyonight"}

[Saiba mais aqui](https://opencode.ai/docs/themes)
.

* * *

### [Agentes](https://opencode.ai/docs/pt-br/config#agentes)

Você pode configurar agentes especializados para tarefas específicas através da opção `agent`.

    {  "$schema": "https://opencode.ai/config.json",  "agent": {    "code-reviewer": {      "description": "Revisa código para melhores práticas e potenciais problemas",      "model": "anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-5",      "prompt": "Você é um revisor de código. Foque em segurança, performance e manutenibilidade.",      "tools": {        // Desabilitar ferramentas de modificação de arquivo para agente de apenas revisão        "write": false,        "edit": false,      },    },  },}

Você também pode definir agentes usando arquivos markdown em `~/.config/opencode/agents/` ou `.opencode/agents/`. [Saiba mais aqui](https://opencode.ai/docs/agents)
.

* * *

### [Agente padrão](https://opencode.ai/docs/pt-br/config#agente-padr%C3%A3o)

Você pode definir o agente padrão usando a opção `default_agent`. Isso determina qual agente é usado quando nenhum é explicitamente especificado.

    {  "$schema": "https://opencode.ai/config.json",  "default_agent": "plan"}

O agente padrão deve ser um agente primário (não um subagente). Isso pode ser um agente embutido como `"build"` ou `"plan"`, ou um [agente personalizado](https://opencode.ai/docs/agents)
 que você definiu. Se o agente especificado não existir ou for um subagente, o opencode recuará para `"build"` com um aviso.

Essa configuração se aplica a todas as interfaces: TUI, CLI (`opencode run`), aplicativo desktop e GitHub Action.

* * *

### [Compartilhamento](https://opencode.ai/docs/pt-br/config#compartilhamento)

Você pode configurar o recurso [share](https://opencode.ai/docs/share)
 através da opção `share`.

    {  "$schema": "https://opencode.ai/config.json",  "share": "manual"}

Isso aceita:

*   `"manual"` - Permitir compartilhamento manual via comandos (padrão)
*   `"auto"` - Compartilhar novas conversas automaticamente
*   `"disabled"` - Desabilitar compartilhamento completamente

Por padrão, o compartilhamento é definido para o modo manual, onde você precisa compartilhar explicitamente as conversas usando o comando `/share`.

* * *

### [Comandos](https://opencode.ai/docs/pt-br/config#comandos)

Você pode configurar comandos personalizados para tarefas repetitivas através da opção `command`.

    {  "$schema": "https://opencode.ai/config.json",  "command": {    "test": {      "template": "Execute a suíte de testes completa com relatório de cobertura e mostre quaisquer falhas.\nConcentre-se nos testes com falha e sugira correções.",      "description": "Execute testes com cobertura",      "agent": "build",      "model": "anthropic/claude-haiku-4-5",    },    "component": {      "template": "Crie um novo componente React chamado $ARGUMENTS com suporte a TypeScript.\nInclua tipagem adequada e estrutura básica.",      "description": "Crie um novo componente",    },  },}

Você também pode definir comandos usando arquivos markdown em `~/.config/opencode/commands/` ou `.opencode/commands/`. [Saiba mais aqui](https://opencode.ai/docs/commands)
.

* * *

### [Atalhos de teclado](https://opencode.ai/docs/pt-br/config#atalhos-de-teclado)

Personalize atalhos de teclado em `tui.json`.

    {  "$schema": "https://opencode.ai/tui.json",  "keybinds": {}}

[Saiba mais aqui](https://opencode.ai/docs/keybinds)
.

* * *

### [Atualização automática](https://opencode.ai/docs/pt-br/config#atualiza%C3%A7%C3%A3o-autom%C3%A1tica)

O opencode fará o download automaticamente de quaisquer novas atualizações quando for iniciado. Você pode desabilitar isso com a opção `autoupdate`.

    {  "$schema": "https://opencode.ai/config.json",  "autoupdate": false}

Se você não quiser atualizações, mas deseja ser notificado quando uma nova versão estiver disponível, defina `autoupdate` como `"notify"`. Observe que isso só funciona se não foi instalado usando um gerenciador de pacotes como o Homebrew.

* * *

### [Formatadores](https://opencode.ai/docs/pt-br/config#formatadores)

Você pode configurar formatadores de código através da opção `formatter`.

    {  "$schema": "https://opencode.ai/config.json",  "formatter": {    "prettier": {      "disabled": true    },    "custom-prettier": {      "command": ["npx", "prettier", "--write", "$FILE"],      "environment": {        "NODE_ENV": "development"      },      "extensions": [".js", ".ts", ".jsx", ".tsx"]    }  }}

[Saiba mais sobre formatadores aqui](https://opencode.ai/docs/formatters)
.

* * *

### [Permissões](https://opencode.ai/docs/pt-br/config#permiss%C3%B5es)

Por padrão, o opencode **permite todas as operações** sem exigir aprovação explícita. Você pode mudar isso usando a opção `permission`.

Por exemplo, para garantir que as ferramentas `edit` e `bash` exijam aprovação do usuário:

    {  "$schema": "https://opencode.ai/config.json",  "permission": {    "edit": "ask",    "bash": "ask"  }}

[Saiba mais sobre permissões aqui](https://opencode.ai/docs/permissions)
.

* * *

### [Compactação](https://opencode.ai/docs/pt-br/config#compacta%C3%A7%C3%A3o)

Você pode controlar o comportamento de compactação de contexto através da opção `compaction`.

    {  "$schema": "https://opencode.ai/config.json",  "compaction": {    "auto": true,    "prune": true,    "reserved": 10000  }}

*   `auto` - Compactar automaticamente a sessão quando o contexto estiver cheio (padrão: `true`).
*   `prune` - Remover saídas antigas de ferramentas para economizar tokens (padrão: `true`).
*   `reserved` - Buffer de tokens para compactação. Deixa janela suficiente para evitar estouro durante a compactação

* * *

### [Observador](https://opencode.ai/docs/pt-br/config#observador)

Você pode configurar padrões de ignorar do observador de arquivos através da opção `watcher`.

    {  "$schema": "https://opencode.ai/config.json",  "watcher": {    "ignore": ["node_modules/**", "dist/**", ".git/**"]  }}

Os padrões seguem a sintaxe glob. Use isso para excluir diretórios barulhentos da observação de arquivos.

* * *

### [Servidores MCP](https://opencode.ai/docs/pt-br/config#servidores-mcp)

Você pode configurar servidores MCP que deseja usar através da opção `mcp`.

    {  "$schema": "https://opencode.ai/config.json",  "mcp": {}}

[Saiba mais aqui](https://opencode.ai/docs/mcp-servers)
.

* * *

### [Plugins](https://opencode.ai/docs/pt-br/config#plugins)

[Plugins](https://opencode.ai/docs/plugins)
 estendem o opencode com ferramentas, hooks e integrações personalizadas.

Coloque arquivos de plugin em `.opencode/plugins/` ou `~/.config/opencode/plugins/`. Você também pode carregar plugins do npm através da opção `plugin`.

    {  "$schema": "https://opencode.ai/config.json",  "plugin": ["opencode-helicone-session", "@my-org/custom-plugin"]}

[Saiba mais aqui](https://opencode.ai/docs/plugins)
.

* * *

### [Instruções](https://opencode.ai/docs/pt-br/config#instru%C3%A7%C3%B5es)

Você pode configurar as instruções para o modelo que está usando através da opção `instructions`.

    {  "$schema": "https://opencode.ai/config.json",  "instructions": ["CONTRIBUTING.md", "docs/guidelines.md", ".cursor/rules/*.md"]}

Isso aceita um array de caminhos e padrões glob para arquivos de instrução. [Saiba mais sobre regras aqui](https://opencode.ai/docs/rules)
.

* * *

### [Provedores desabilitados](https://opencode.ai/docs/pt-br/config#provedores-desabilitados)

Você pode desabilitar provedores que são carregados automaticamente através da opção `disabled_providers`. Isso é útil quando você deseja impedir que certos provedores sejam carregados, mesmo que suas credenciais estejam disponíveis.

    {  "$schema": "https://opencode.ai/config.json",  "disabled_providers": ["openai", "gemini"]}

A opção `disabled_providers` aceita um array de IDs de provedores. Quando um provedor é desabilitado:

*   Ele não será carregado, mesmo que variáveis de ambiente estejam definidas.
*   Ele não será carregado, mesmo que chaves de API estejam configuradas através do comando `/connect`.
*   Os modelos do provedor não aparecerão na lista de seleção de modelos.

* * *

### [Provedores habilitados](https://opencode.ai/docs/pt-br/config#provedores-habilitados)

Você pode especificar uma lista de permissão de provedores através da opção `enabled_providers`. Quando definida, apenas os provedores especificados serão habilitados e todos os outros serão ignorados.

    {  "$schema": "https://opencode.ai/config.json",  "enabled_providers": ["anthropic", "openai"]}

Isso é útil quando você deseja restringir o opencode para usar apenas provedores específicos, em vez de desabilitá-los um a um.

Se um provedor aparecer em `enabled_providers` e `disabled_providers`, a `disabled_providers` tem prioridade para compatibilidade retroativa.

* * *

### [Experimental](https://opencode.ai/docs/pt-br/config#experimental)

A chave `experimental` contém opções que estão em desenvolvimento ativo.

    {  "$schema": "https://opencode.ai/config.json",  "experimental": {}}

* * *

[Variáveis](https://opencode.ai/docs/pt-br/config#vari%C3%A1veis)

------------------------------------------------------------------

Você pode usar substituição de variáveis em seus arquivos de configuração para referenciar variáveis de ambiente e conteúdos de arquivos.

* * *

### [Variáveis de ambiente](https://opencode.ai/docs/pt-br/config#vari%C3%A1veis-de-ambiente)

Use `{env:VARIABLE_NAME}` para substituir variáveis de ambiente:

    {  "$schema": "https://opencode.ai/config.json",  "model": "{env:OPENCODE_MODEL}",  "provider": {    "anthropic": {      "models": {},      "options": {        "apiKey": "{env:ANTHROPIC_API_KEY}"      }    }  }}

Se a variável de ambiente não estiver definida, ela será substituída por uma string vazia.

* * *

### [Arquivos](https://opencode.ai/docs/pt-br/config#arquivos)

Use `{file:path/to/file}` para substituir o conteúdo de um arquivo:

    {  "$schema": "https://opencode.ai/config.json",  "instructions": ["./custom-instructions.md"],  "provider": {    "openai": {      "options": {        "apiKey": "{file:~/.secrets/openai-key}"      }    }  }}

Os caminhos dos arquivos podem ser:

*   Relativos ao diretório do arquivo de configuração
*   Ou caminhos absolutos começando com `/` ou `~`

Esses são úteis para:

*   Manter dados sensíveis, como chaves de API, em arquivos separados.
*   Incluir grandes arquivos de instrução sem sobrecarregar sua configuração.
*   Compartilhar trechos de configuração comuns entre vários arquivos de configuração.

---

# الخادم | OpenCode

[تخطَّ إلى المحتوى](https://opencode.ai/docs/ar/server#_top)

الخادم
======

تفاعل مع خادم opencode عبر HTTP.

يشغّل الأمر `opencode serve` خادما HTTP دون واجهة ويعرض نقطة نهاية OpenAPI يمكن لعميل opencode استخدامها.

* * *

### [الاستخدام](https://opencode.ai/docs/ar/server#%D8%A7%D9%84%D8%A7%D8%B3%D8%AA%D8%AE%D8%AF%D8%A7%D9%85)

    opencode serve [--port <number>] [--hostname <string>] [--cors <origin>]

#### [الخيارات](https://opencode.ai/docs/ar/server#%D8%A7%D9%84%D8%AE%D9%8A%D8%A7%D8%B1%D8%A7%D8%AA)

| الخيار | الوصف | الافتراضي |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `--port` | المنفذ الذي يستمع عليه | `4096` |
| `--hostname` | اسم المضيف الذي يستمع عليه | `127.0.0.1` |
| `--mdns` | تفعيل اكتشاف mDNS | `false` |
| `--mdns-domain` | اسم نطاق مخصص لخدمة mDNS | `opencode.local` |
| `--cors` | أصول (Origins) متصفح إضافية مسموح بها | `[]` |

يمكن تمرير `--cors` عدة مرات:

    opencode serve --cors http://localhost:5173 --cors https://app.example.com

* * *

### [المصادقة](https://opencode.ai/docs/ar/server#%D8%A7%D9%84%D9%85%D8%B5%D8%A7%D8%AF%D9%82%D8%A9)

عيّن `OPENCODE_SERVER_PASSWORD` لحماية الخادم باستخدام مصادقة HTTP الأساسية. اسم المستخدم افتراضيا هو `opencode`، أو عيّن `OPENCODE_SERVER_USERNAME` لتغييره. ينطبق ذلك على كل من `opencode serve` و `opencode web`.

    OPENCODE_SERVER_PASSWORD=your-password opencode serve

* * *

### [كيف يعمل](https://opencode.ai/docs/ar/server#%D9%83%D9%8A%D9%81-%D9%8A%D8%B9%D9%85%D9%84)

عند تشغيل `opencode` يبدأ تشغيل واجهة terminal تفاعلية (TUI) وخادما. تكون الـ TUI هي العميل الذي يتحدث إلى الخادم. يوفّر الخادم نقطة نهاية لمواصفة OpenAPI 3.1. وتُستخدم هذه النقطة أيضا لتوليد [SDK](https://opencode.ai/docs/sdk)
.

تتيح هذه البنية لـ opencode دعم عدة عملاء وتمكّنك من التفاعل مع opencode برمجيا.

يمكنك تشغيل `opencode serve` لبدء خادم مستقل. إذا كانت واجهة opencode في terminal (TUI) قيد التشغيل، فسيبدأ `opencode serve` خادما جديدا.

* * *

#### [الاتصال بخادم موجود](https://opencode.ai/docs/ar/server#%D8%A7%D9%84%D8%A7%D8%AA%D8%B5%D8%A7%D9%84-%D8%A8%D8%AE%D8%A7%D8%AF%D9%85-%D9%85%D9%88%D8%AC%D9%88%D8%AF)

عند بدء الـ TUI تقوم بتعيين منفذ واسم مضيف عشوائيا. يمكنك بدلا من ذلك تمرير [الخيارات](https://opencode.ai/docs/cli)
 `--hostname` و `--port`، ثم استخدامهما للاتصال بخادمها.

يمكن استخدام نقطة النهاية [`/tui`](https://opencode.ai/docs/ar/server#tui)
 للتحكم في الـ TUI عبر الخادم. على سبيل المثال، يمكنك تعبئة الموجّه مسبقا أو تشغيله. يُستخدم هذا الإعداد بواسطة ملحقات OpenCode لـ [IDE](https://opencode.ai/docs/ide)
.

* * *

[المواصفات](https://opencode.ai/docs/ar/server#%D8%A7%D9%84%D9%85%D9%88%D8%A7%D8%B5%D9%81%D8%A7%D8%AA)

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

ينشر الخادم مواصفة OpenAPI 3.1 ويمكن عرضها على:

    http://<hostname>:<port>/doc

على سبيل المثال: `http://localhost:4096/doc`. استخدم المواصفة لتوليد عملاء أو لفحص أنواع الطلبات والاستجابات. أو اعرضها في مستكشف Swagger.

* * *

[واجهات API](https://opencode.ai/docs/ar/server#%D9%88%D8%A7%D8%AC%D9%87%D8%A7%D8%AA-api)

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

يعرض خادم opencode واجهات API التالية.

* * *

### [عام](https://opencode.ai/docs/ar/server#%D8%B9%D8%A7%D9%85)

| الطريقة | المسار | الوصف | الاستجابة |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `GET` | `/global/health` | الحصول على صحة الخادم وإصداره | `{ healthy: true, version: string }` |
| `GET` | `/global/event` | الحصول على الأحداث العامة (تدفق SSE) | تدفق أحداث |

* * *

### [المشروع](https://opencode.ai/docs/ar/server#%D8%A7%D9%84%D9%85%D8%B4%D8%B1%D9%88%D8%B9)

| الطريقة | المسار | الوصف | الاستجابة |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `GET` | `/project` | سرد جميع المشاريع | [`Project[]`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |
| `GET` | `/project/current` | الحصول على المشروع الحالي | [`Project`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |

* * *

### [المسار و VCS](https://opencode.ai/docs/ar/server#%D8%A7%D9%84%D9%85%D8%B3%D8%A7%D8%B1-%D9%88-vcs)

| الطريقة | المسار | الوصف | الاستجابة |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `GET` | `/path` | الحصول على المسار الحالي | [`Path`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |
| `GET` | `/vcs` | الحصول على معلومات VCS للمشروع الحالي | [`VcsInfo`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |

* * *

### [المثيل](https://opencode.ai/docs/ar/server#%D8%A7%D9%84%D9%85%D8%AB%D9%8A%D9%84)

| الطريقة | المسار | الوصف | الاستجابة |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `POST` | `/instance/dispose` | التخلص من المثيل الحالي | `boolean` |

* * *

### [الإعدادات](https://opencode.ai/docs/ar/server#%D8%A7%D9%84%D8%A5%D8%B9%D8%AF%D8%A7%D8%AF%D8%A7%D8%AA)

| الطريقة | المسار | الوصف | الاستجابة |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `GET` | `/config` | الحصول على معلومات الإعدادات | [`Config`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |
| `PATCH` | `/config` | تحديث الإعدادات | [`Config`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |
| `GET` | `/config/providers` | سرد المزوّدين والنماذج الافتراضية | `{ providers:` [Provider\[\]](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts)<br>`, default: { [key: string]: string } }` |

* * *

### [المزوّد](https://opencode.ai/docs/ar/server#%D8%A7%D9%84%D9%85%D8%B2%D9%88%D9%91%D8%AF)

| الطريقة | المسار | الوصف | الاستجابة |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `GET` | `/provider` | سرد جميع المزوّدين | `{ all:` [Provider\[\]](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts)<br>`, default: {...}, connected: string[] }` |
| `GET` | `/provider/auth` | الحصول على طرق مصادقة المزوّد | `{ [providerID: string]:` [ProviderAuthMethod\[\]](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts)<br> `}` |
| `POST` | `/provider/{id}/oauth/authorize` | تفويض مزوّد باستخدام OAuth | [`ProviderAuthAuthorization`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |
| `POST` | `/provider/{id}/oauth/callback` | معالجة رد نداء OAuth لمزوّد | `boolean` |

* * *

### [الجلسات](https://opencode.ai/docs/ar/server#%D8%A7%D9%84%D8%AC%D9%84%D8%B3%D8%A7%D8%AA)

| الطريقة | المسار | الوصف | الملاحظات |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `GET` | `/session` | سرد جميع الجلسات | يعيد [`Session[]`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |
| `POST` | `/session` | إنشاء جلسة جديدة | المتن: `{ parentID?, title? }`، يعيد [`Session`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |
| `GET` | `/session/status` | الحصول على حالة الجلسات جميعها | يعيد `{ [sessionID: string]:` [SessionStatus](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts)<br> `}` |
| `GET` | `/session/:id` | الحصول على تفاصيل الجلسة | يعيد [`Session`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |
| `DELETE` | `/session/:id` | حذف جلسة وجميع بياناتها | يعيد `boolean` |
| `PATCH` | `/session/:id` | تحديث خصائص الجلسة | المتن: `{ title? }`، يعيد [`Session`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |
| `GET` | `/session/:id/children` | الحصول على الجلسات الفرعية لجلسة | يعيد [`Session[]`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |
| `GET` | `/session/:id/todo` | الحصول على قائمة المهام (todo) للجلسة | يعيد [`Todo[]`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |
| `POST` | `/session/:id/init` | تحليل التطبيق وإنشاء `AGENTS.md` | المتن: `{ messageID, providerID, modelID }`، يعيد `boolean` |
| `POST` | `/session/:id/fork` | تفريع جلسة موجودة عند رسالة | المتن: `{ messageID? }`، يعيد [`Session`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |
| `POST` | `/session/:id/abort` | إلغاء جلسة قيد التشغيل | يعيد `boolean` |
| `POST` | `/session/:id/share` | مشاركة جلسة | يعيد [`Session`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |
| `DELETE` | `/session/:id/share` | إلغاء مشاركة جلسة | يعيد [`Session`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |
| `GET` | `/session/:id/diff` | الحصول على diff لهذه الجلسة | الاستعلام: `messageID?`، يعيد [`FileDiff[]`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |
| `POST` | `/session/:id/summarize` | تلخيص الجلسة | المتن: `{ providerID, modelID }`، يعيد `boolean` |
| `POST` | `/session/:id/revert` | التراجع عن رسالة | المتن: `{ messageID, partID? }`، يعيد `boolean` |
| `POST` | `/session/:id/unrevert` | استعادة جميع الرسائل المتراجع عنها | يعيد `boolean` |
| `POST` | `/session/:id/permissions/:permissionID` | الرد على طلب إذن | المتن: `{ response, remember? }`، يعيد `boolean` |

* * *

### [الرسائل](https://opencode.ai/docs/ar/server#%D8%A7%D9%84%D8%B1%D8%B3%D8%A7%D8%A6%D9%84)

| الطريقة | المسار | الوصف | الملاحظات |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `GET` | `/session/:id/message` | سرد رسائل جلسة | الاستعلام: `limit?`، يعيد `{ info:` [Message](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts)<br>`, parts:` [Part\[\]](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts)<br>`}[]` |
| `POST` | `/session/:id/message` | إرسال رسالة والانتظار للحصول على رد | المتن: `{ messageID?, model?, agent?, noReply?, system?, tools?, parts }`، يعيد `{ info:` [Message](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts)<br>`, parts:` [Part\[\]](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts)<br>`}` |
| `GET` | `/session/:id/message/:messageID` | الحصول على تفاصيل الرسالة | يعيد `{ info:` [Message](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts)<br>`, parts:` [Part\[\]](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts)<br>`}` |
| `POST` | `/session/:id/prompt_async` | إرسال رسالة بشكل غير متزامن (بدون انتظار) | المتن: مثل `/session/:id/message`، يعيد `204 No Content` |
| `POST` | `/session/:id/command` | تنفيذ أمر شرطة مائلة (slash) | المتن: `{ messageID?, agent?, model?, command, arguments }`، يعيد `{ info:` [Message](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts)<br>`, parts:` [Part\[\]](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts)<br>`}` |
| `POST` | `/session/:id/shell` | تشغيل أمر في shell | المتن: `{ agent, model?, command }`، يعيد `{ info:` [Message](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts)<br>`, parts:` [Part\[\]](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts)<br>`}` |

* * *

### [الأوامر](https://opencode.ai/docs/ar/server#%D8%A7%D9%84%D8%A3%D9%88%D8%A7%D9%85%D8%B1)

| الطريقة | المسار | الوصف | الاستجابة |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `GET` | `/command` | سرد جميع الأوامر | [`Command[]`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |

* * *

### [الملفات](https://opencode.ai/docs/ar/server#%D8%A7%D9%84%D9%85%D9%84%D9%81%D8%A7%D8%AA)

| الطريقة | المسار | الوصف | الاستجابة |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `GET` | `/find?pattern=<pat>` | البحث عن نص داخل الملفات | مصفوفة من كائنات المطابقة تحتوي على `path` و`lines` و`line_number` و`absolute_offset` و`submatches` |
| `GET` | `/find/file?query=<q>` | العثور على الملفات والمجلدات بالاسم | `string[]` (مسارات) |
| `GET` | `/find/symbol?query=<q>` | العثور على رموز مساحة العمل | [`Symbol[]`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |
| `GET` | `/file?path=<path>` | سرد الملفات والمجلدات | [`FileNode[]`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |
| `GET` | `/file/content?path=<p>` | قراءة ملف | [`FileContent`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |
| `GET` | `/file/status` | الحصول على حالة الملفات المتعقّبة | [`File[]`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |

#### [معلمات الاستعلام لـ `/find/file`](https://opencode.ai/docs/ar/server#%D9%85%D8%B9%D9%84%D9%85%D8%A7%D8%AA-%D8%A7%D9%84%D8%A7%D8%B3%D8%AA%D8%B9%D9%84%D8%A7%D9%85-%D9%84%D9%80-findfile)

*   `query` (مطلوب) — سلسلة البحث (مطابقة ضبابية)
*   `type` (اختياري) — حصر النتائج في `"file"` أو `"directory"`
*   `directory` (اختياري) — تجاوز جذر المشروع لأجل البحث
*   `limit` (اختياري) — الحد الأقصى للنتائج (1–200)
*   `dirs` (اختياري) — خيار قديم (إرجاع `"false"` يعيد الملفات فقط)

* * *

### [الأدوات (تجريبية)](https://opencode.ai/docs/ar/server#%D8%A7%D9%84%D8%A3%D8%AF%D9%88%D8%A7%D8%AA-%D8%AA%D8%AC%D8%B1%D9%8A%D8%A8%D9%8A%D8%A9)

| الطريقة | المسار | الوصف | الاستجابة |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `GET` | `/experimental/tool/ids` | سرد جميع معرّفات الأدوات | [`ToolIDs`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |
| `GET` | `/experimental/tool?provider=<p>&model=<m>` | سرد الأدوات مع مخططات JSON لنموذج | [`ToolList`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |

* * *

### [LSP والمنسّقات و MCP](https://opencode.ai/docs/ar/server#lsp-%D9%88%D8%A7%D9%84%D9%85%D9%86%D8%B3%D9%91%D9%82%D8%A7%D8%AA-%D9%88-mcp)

| الطريقة | المسار | الوصف | الاستجابة |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `GET` | `/lsp` | الحصول على حالة خادم LSP | [`LSPStatus[]`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |
| `GET` | `/formatter` | الحصول على حالة المنسّقات | [`FormatterStatus[]`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |
| `GET` | `/mcp` | الحصول على حالة خادم MCP | `{ [name: string]:` [MCPStatus](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts)<br> `}` |
| `POST` | `/mcp` | إضافة خادم MCP ديناميكيا | المتن: `{ name, config }`، يعيد كائن حالة MCP |

* * *

### [الوكلاء](https://opencode.ai/docs/ar/server#%D8%A7%D9%84%D9%88%D9%83%D9%84%D8%A7%D8%A1)

| الطريقة | المسار | الوصف | الاستجابة |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `GET` | `/agent` | سرد جميع الوكلاء المتاحين | [`Agent[]`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |

* * *

### [التسجيل](https://opencode.ai/docs/ar/server#%D8%A7%D9%84%D8%AA%D8%B3%D8%AC%D9%8A%D9%84)

| الطريقة | المسار | الوصف | الاستجابة |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `POST` | `/log` | كتابة إدخال سجل. المتن: `{ service, level, message, extra? }` | `boolean` |

* * *

### [TUI](https://opencode.ai/docs/ar/server#tui)

| الطريقة | المسار | الوصف | الاستجابة |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `POST` | `/tui/append-prompt` | إلحاق نص بالموجّه | `boolean` |
| `POST` | `/tui/open-help` | فتح مربع حوار المساعدة | `boolean` |
| `POST` | `/tui/open-sessions` | فتح محدد الجلسات | `boolean` |
| `POST` | `/tui/open-themes` | فتح محدد السمات | `boolean` |
| `POST` | `/tui/open-models` | فتح محدد النماذج | `boolean` |
| `POST` | `/tui/submit-prompt` | إرسال الموجّه الحالي | `boolean` |
| `POST` | `/tui/clear-prompt` | مسح الموجّه | `boolean` |
| `POST` | `/tui/execute-command` | تنفيذ أمر (`{ command }`) | `boolean` |
| `POST` | `/tui/show-toast` | عرض toast (`{ title?, message, variant }`) | `boolean` |
| `GET` | `/tui/control/next` | الانتظار لطلب التحكم التالي | كائن طلب تحكم |
| `POST` | `/tui/control/response` | الاستجابة لطلب تحكم (`{ body }`) | `boolean` |

* * *

### [المصادقة](https://opencode.ai/docs/ar/server#%D8%A7%D9%84%D9%85%D8%B5%D8%A7%D8%AF%D9%82%D8%A9-1)

| الطريقة | المسار | الوصف | الاستجابة |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `PUT` | `/auth/:id` | تعيين بيانات اعتماد المصادقة. يجب أن يطابق المتن مخطط المزوّد | `boolean` |

* * *

### [الأحداث](https://opencode.ai/docs/ar/server#%D8%A7%D9%84%D8%A3%D8%AD%D8%AF%D8%A7%D8%AB)

| الطريقة | المسار | الوصف | الاستجابة |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `GET` | `/event` | تدفق أحداث مرسلة من الخادم (SSE). أول حدث هو `server.connected` ثم أحداث الحافلة | تدفق أحداث مرسلة من الخادم |

* * *

### [التوثيق](https://opencode.ai/docs/ar/server#%D8%A7%D9%84%D8%AA%D9%88%D8%AB%D9%8A%D9%82)

| الطريقة | المسار | الوصف | الاستجابة |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `GET` | `/doc` | مواصفة OpenAPI 3.1 | صفحة HTML تتضمن مواصفة OpenAPI |

---

# Sunucu | OpenCode

[İçeriğe geç](https://opencode.ai/docs/tr/server#_top)

Sunucu
======

opencode sunucusuyla HTTP uzerinden etkilesin.

`opencode serve` komutu, opencode istemcisinin kullanabileceği bir OpenAPI endpoint’i açan headless bir HTTP sunucusu çalıştırır.

* * *

### [Kullanım](https://opencode.ai/docs/tr/server#kullan%C4%B1m)

    opencode serve [--port <number>] [--hostname <string>] [--cors <origin>]

#### [Seçenekler](https://opencode.ai/docs/tr/server#se%C3%A7enekler)

| Bayrak | Açıklama | Varsayılan |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `--port` | Dinlenecek bağlantı noktası | `4096` |
| `--hostname` | Dinlenecek ana bilgisayar adı | `127.0.0.1` |
| `--mdns` | mDNS keşfini etkinleştir | `false` |
| `--mdns-domain` | mDNS hizmeti için özel alan adı | `opencode.local` |
| `--cors` | İzin verilecek ek tarayıcı kaynakları (origin) | `[]` |

`--cors` birden fazla kez geçilebilir:

    opencode serve --cors http://localhost:5173 --cors https://app.example.com

* * *

### [Kimlik Doğrulama](https://opencode.ai/docs/tr/server#kimlik-do%C4%9Frulama)

Sunucuyu HTTP temel kimlik doğrulama (basic auth) ile korumak için `OPENCODE_SERVER_PASSWORD` ayarlayın. Kullanıcı adı varsayılan olarak `opencode` değeridir; değiştirmek isterseniz `OPENCODE_SERVER_USERNAME` ayarlayabilirsiniz. Bu ayar hem `opencode serve` hem de `opencode web` için geçerlidir.

    OPENCODE_SERVER_PASSWORD=your-password opencode serve

* * *

### [Nasıl çalışır](https://opencode.ai/docs/tr/server#nas%C4%B1l-%C3%A7al%C4%B1%C5%9F%C4%B1r)

`opencode` çalıştırdığınızda hem TUI hem de sunucu başlar. TUI, sunucuyla konuşan istemci tarafıdır. Sunucu bir OpenAPI 3.1 spesifikasyon uç noktası açar. Bu uç nokta [SDK](https://opencode.ai/docs/sdk)
 üretiminde de kullanılır.

Bu mimari, opencode’un birden fazla istemciyi desteklemesini ve programatik kullanımları mümkün kılmasını sağlar.

`opencode serve` ile bağımsız bir sunucu başlatabilirsiniz. opencode TUI açıksa, `opencode serve` yeni bir sunucu başlatır.

* * *

#### [Mevcut sunucuya bağlanın](https://opencode.ai/docs/tr/server#mevcut-sunucuya-ba%C4%9Flan%C4%B1n)

TUI başlarken rastgele bir port ve hostname atanır. Bunun yerine `--hostname` ve `--port` [bayraklarını](https://opencode.ai/docs/cli)
 verebilirsiniz.

[`/tui`](https://opencode.ai/docs/tr/server#tui)
 uç noktası sunucu üzerinden TUI’yi sürmek için kullanılabilir. Örneğin bir istemi önceden doldurabilir veya çalıştırabilirsiniz. Bu kurulum opencode [IDE](https://opencode.ai/docs/ide)
 eklentileri tarafından kullanılır.

* * *

[Spesifikasyon](https://opencode.ai/docs/tr/server#spesifikasyon)

------------------------------------------------------------------

Sunucu, şu adreste görülebilen bir OpenAPI 3.1 spesifikasyonu yayınlar:

    http://<hostname>:<port>/doc

Örneğin `http://localhost:4096/doc`. İstemci oluşturmak, istek/yanit tiplerini incelemek veya Swagger gezgininde açmak için bu spec’i kullanın.

* * *

[API’ler](https://opencode.ai/docs/tr/server#apiler)

-----------------------------------------------------

opencode sunucusu aşağıdaki API’leri sunar.

* * *

### [Global](https://opencode.ai/docs/tr/server#global)

| Yöntem | Yol | Açıklama | Yanıt |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `GET` | `/global/health` | Sunucu sağlığını ve sürümünü al | `{ healthy: true, version: string }` |
| `GET` | `/global/event` | Küresel olayları al (SSE akışı) | Olay akışı |

* * *

### [Proje](https://opencode.ai/docs/tr/server#proje)

| Yöntem | Yol | Açıklama | Yanıt |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `GET` | `/project` | Tüm projeleri listele | [`Project[]`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |
| `GET` | `/project/current` | Mevcut projeyi al | [`Project`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |

* * *

### [Yol & VCS](https://opencode.ai/docs/tr/server#yol--vcs)

| Yöntem | Yol | Açıklama | Yanıt |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `GET` | `/path` | Mevcut yolu al | [`Path`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |
| `GET` | `/vcs` | Mevcut proje için VCS bilgisini al | [`VcsInfo`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |

* * *

### [Örnek (Instance)](https://opencode.ai/docs/tr/server#%C3%B6rnek-instance)

| Yöntem | Yol | Açıklama | Yanıt |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `POST` | `/instance/dispose` | Mevcut örneği (instance) kapat | `boolean` |

* * *

### [Config](https://opencode.ai/docs/tr/server#config)

| Yöntem | Yol | Açıklama | Yanıt |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `GET` | `/config` | Yapılandırma bilgisini al | [`Config`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |
| `PATCH` | `/config` | Yapılandırmayı güncelle | [`Config`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |
| `GET` | `/config/providers` | Sağlayıcıları ve varsayılan modelleri listele | `{ providers:` [Provider\[\]](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts)<br>`, default: { [key: string]: string } }` |

* * *

### [Sağlayıcı (Provider)](https://opencode.ai/docs/tr/server#sa%C4%9Flay%C4%B1c%C4%B1-provider)

| Yöntem | Yol | Açıklama | Yanıt |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `GET` | `/provider` | Tüm sağlayıcıları listele | `{ all:` [Provider\[\]](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts)<br>`, default: {...}, connected: string[] }` |
| `GET` | `/provider/auth` | Sağlayıcı kimlik doğrulama yöntemlerini al | `{ [providerID: string]:` [ProviderAuthMethod\[\]](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts)<br> `}` |
| `POST` | `/provider/{id}/oauth/authorize` | OAuth kullanarak bir sağlayıcıyı yetkilendir | [`ProviderAuthAuthorization`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |
| `POST` | `/provider/{id}/oauth/callback` | Bir sağlayıcı için OAuth geri çağrısını işle | `boolean` |

* * *

### [Oturumlar (Sessions)](https://opencode.ai/docs/tr/server#oturumlar-sessions)

| Yöntem | Yol | Açıklama | Notlar |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `GET` | `/session` | Tüm oturumları listele | [`Session[]`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts)<br> döndürür |
| `POST` | `/session` | Yeni bir oturum oluştur | gövde: `{ parentID?, title? }`, [`Session`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts)<br> döndürür |
| `GET` | `/session/status` | Tüm oturumlar için durumu al | `{ [sessionID: string]:` [SessionStatus](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts)<br> `}` döndürür |
| `GET` | `/session/:id` | Oturum ayrıntılarını al | [`Session`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts)<br> döndürür |
| `DELETE` | `/session/:id` | Bir oturumu ve tüm verilerini sil | `boolean` döndürür |
| `PATCH` | `/session/:id` | Oturum özelliklerini güncelle | gövde: `{ title? }`, [`Session`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts)<br> döndürür |
| `GET` | `/session/:id/children` | Bir oturumun alt oturumlarını al | [`Session[]`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts)<br> döndürür |
| `GET` | `/session/:id/todo` | Bir oturum için yapılacaklar listesini al | [`Todo[]`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts)<br> döndürür |
| `POST` | `/session/:id/init` | Uygulamayı analiz et ve `AGENTS.md` oluştur | gövde: `{ messageID, providerID, modelID }`, `boolean` döndürür |
| `POST` | `/session/:id/fork` | Mevcut bir oturumu bir mesajda çatalla | gövde: `{ messageID? }`, [`Session`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts)<br> döndürür |
| `POST` | `/session/:id/abort` | Çalışan bir oturumu iptal et | `boolean` döndürür |
| `POST` | `/session/:id/share` | Bir oturumu paylaş | [`Session`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts)<br> döndürür |
| `DELETE` | `/session/:id/share` | Bir oturumun paylaşımını kaldır | [`Session`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts)<br> döndürür |
| `GET` | `/session/:id/diff` | Bu oturum için farkı (diff) al | sorgu: `messageID?`, [`FileDiff[]`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts)<br> döndürür |
| `POST` | `/session/:id/summarize` | Oturumu özetle | gövde: `{ providerID, modelID }`, `boolean` döndürür |
| `POST` | `/session/:id/revert` | Bir mesajı geri al | gövde: `{ messageID, partID? }`, `boolean` döndürür |
| `POST` | `/session/:id/unrevert` | Geri alınan tüm mesajları geri yükle | `boolean` döndürür |
| `POST` | `/session/:id/permissions/:permissionID` | Bir izin isteğine yanıt ver | gövde: `{ response, remember? }`, `boolean` döndürür |

* * *

### [Mesajlar](https://opencode.ai/docs/tr/server#mesajlar)

| Yöntem | Yol | Açıklama | Notlar |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `GET` | `/session/:id/message` | Bir oturumdaki mesajları listele | sorgu: `limit?`, `{ info:` [Message](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts)<br>`, parts:` [Part\[\]](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts)<br>`}[]` döndürür |
| `POST` | `/session/:id/message` | Bir mesaj gönder ve yanıt bekle | gövde: `{ messageID?, model?, agent?, noReply?, system?, tools?, parts }`, `{ info:` [Message](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts)<br>`, parts:` [Part\[\]](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts)<br>`}` döndürür |
| `GET` | `/session/:id/message/:messageID` | Mesaj ayrıntılarını al | `{ info:` [Message](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts)<br>`, parts:` [Part\[\]](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts)<br>`}` döndürür |
| `POST` | `/session/:id/prompt_async` | Eşzamansız bir mesaj gönder (bekleme yok) | gövde: `/session/:id/message` ile aynı, `204 No Content` döndürür |
| `POST` | `/session/:id/command` | Bir eğik çizgi (slash) komutu çalıştır | gövde: `{ messageID?, agent?, model?, command, arguments }`, `{ info:` [Message](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts)<br>`, parts:` [Part\[\]](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts)<br>`}` döndürür |
| `POST` | `/session/:id/shell` | Bir kabuk komutu çalıştır | gövde: `{ agent, model?, command }`, `{ info:` [Message](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts)<br>`, parts:` [Part\[\]](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts)<br>`}` döndürür |

* * *

### [Komutlar](https://opencode.ai/docs/tr/server#komutlar)

| Yöntem | Yol | Açıklama | Yanıt |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `GET` | `/command` | Tüm komutları listele | [`Command[]`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |

* * *

### [Dosyalar](https://opencode.ai/docs/tr/server#dosyalar)

| Yöntem | Yol | Açıklama | Yanıt |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `GET` | `/find?pattern=<pat>` | Dosyalarda metin ara | `path`, `lines`, `line_number`, `absolute_offset`, `submatches` içeren eşleşme nesneleri dizisi |
| `GET` | `/find/file?query=<q>` | Dosya ve dizinleri isme göre bul | `string[]` (yollar) |
| `GET` | `/find/symbol?query=<q>` | Çalışma alanı sembollerini bul | [`Symbol[]`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |
| `GET` | `/file?path=<path>` | Dosya ve dizinleri listele | [`FileNode[]`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |
| `GET` | `/file/content?path=<p>` | Bir dosyayı oku | [`FileContent`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |
| `GET` | `/file/status` | İzlenen dosyalar için durumu al | [`File[]`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |

#### [`/find/file` sorgu parametreleri](https://opencode.ai/docs/tr/server#findfile-sorgu-parametreleri)

*   `query` (gerekli) - arama metni (bulanık eşleşme)
*   `type` (isteğe bağlı) - sonuçları `"file"` veya `"directory"` ile sınırlama
*   `directory` (isteğe bağlı) - arama için proje kökünü geçersiz kılma
*   `limit` (isteğe bağlı) - en fazla sonuç (1-200)
*   `dirs` (isteğe bağlı) - eski bayrak (`"false"` sadece dosyaları döndürür)

* * *

### [Araçlar (Deneysel)](https://opencode.ai/docs/tr/server#ara%C3%A7lar-deneysel)

| Yöntem | Yol | Açıklama | Yanıt |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `GET` | `/experimental/tool/ids` | Tüm araç kimliklerini listele | [`ToolIDs`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |
| `GET` | `/experimental/tool?provider=<p>&model=<m>` | Bir model için araçları JSON şemalarıyla listele | [`ToolList`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |

* * *

### [LSP, Biçimlendiriciler & MCP](https://opencode.ai/docs/tr/server#lsp-bi%C3%A7imlendiriciler--mcp)

| Yöntem | Yol | Açıklama | Yanıt |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `GET` | `/lsp` | LSP sunucu durumunu al | [`LSPStatus[]`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |
| `GET` | `/formatter` | Biçimlendirici durumunu al | [`FormatterStatus[]`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |
| `GET` | `/mcp` | MCP sunucu durumunu al | `{ [name: string]:` [MCPStatus](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts)<br> `}` |
| `POST` | `/mcp` | Dinamik olarak MCP sunucusu ekle | gövde: `{ name, config }`, MCP durum nesnesi döndürür |

* * *

### [Agent’lar](https://opencode.ai/docs/tr/server#agentlar)

| Yöntem | Yol | Açıklama | Yanıt |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `GET` | `/agent` | Tüm mevcut agent’ları listele | [`Agent[]`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |

* * *

### [Günlük (Logging)](https://opencode.ai/docs/tr/server#g%C3%BCnl%C3%BCk-logging)

| Yöntem | Yol | Açıklama | Yanıt |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `POST` | `/log` | Günlük girdisi yaz. Gövde: `{ service, level, message, extra? }` | `boolean` |

* * *

### [TUI](https://opencode.ai/docs/tr/server#tui)

| Yöntem | Yol | Açıklama | Yanıt |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `POST` | `/tui/append-prompt` | İsteme metin ekle | `boolean` |
| `POST` | `/tui/open-help` | Yardım iletişim kutusunu aç | `boolean` |
| `POST` | `/tui/open-sessions` | Oturum seçiciyi aç | `boolean` |
| `POST` | `/tui/open-themes` | Tema seçiciyi aç | `boolean` |
| `POST` | `/tui/open-models` | Model seçiciyi aç | `boolean` |
| `POST` | `/tui/submit-prompt` | Mevcut istemi gönder | `boolean` |
| `POST` | `/tui/clear-prompt` | İstemi temizle | `boolean` |
| `POST` | `/tui/execute-command` | Bir komut çalıştır (`{ command }`) | `boolean` |
| `POST` | `/tui/show-toast` | Toast bildirimi göster (`{ title?, message, variant }`) | `boolean` |
| `GET` | `/tui/control/next` | Bir sonraki kontrol isteğini bekle | Kontrol isteği nesnesi |
| `POST` | `/tui/control/response` | Bir kontrol isteğine yanıt ver (`{ body }`) | `boolean` |

* * *

### [Kimlik Doğrulama (Auth)](https://opencode.ai/docs/tr/server#kimlik-do%C4%9Frulama-auth)

| Yöntem | Yol | Açıklama | Yanıt |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `PUT` | `/auth/:id` | Kimlik bilgilerini ayarla. Gövde sağlayıcı şemasıyla eşleşmelidir | `boolean` |

* * *

### [Olaylar (Events)](https://opencode.ai/docs/tr/server#olaylar-events)

| Yöntem | Yol | Açıklama | Yanıt |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `GET` | `/event` | Sunucu tarafından gönderilen olay akışı (SSE). İlk olay `server.connected`, ardından veriyolu olayları | Sunucu tarafından gönderilen olay akışı |

* * *

### [Dokümanlar (Docs)](https://opencode.ai/docs/tr/server#dok%C3%BCmanlar-docs)

| Yöntem | Yol | Açıklama | Yanıt |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `GET` | `/doc` | OpenAPI 3.1 spesifikasyonu | OpenAPI spec içeren HTML sayfası |

---

# Servidor | OpenCode

[Pular para o conteúdo](https://opencode.ai/docs/pt-br/server#_top)

Servidor
========

Interaja com o servidor opencode via HTTP.

O comando `opencode serve` executa um servidor HTTP sem cabeça que expõe um endpoint OpenAPI que um cliente opencode pode usar.

* * *

### [Uso](https://opencode.ai/docs/pt-br/server#uso)

    opencode serve [--port <number>] [--hostname <string>] [--cors <origin>]

#### [Opções](https://opencode.ai/docs/pt-br/server#op%C3%A7%C3%B5es)

| Flag | Descrição | Padrão |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `--port` | Porta para escutar | `4096` |
| `--hostname` | Nome do host para escutar | `127.0.0.1` |
| `--mdns` | Habilitar descoberta mDNS | `false` |
| `--mdns-domain` | Nome de domínio personalizado para o serviço mDNS | `opencode.local` |
| `--cors` | Origens adicionais de navegador a permitir | `[]` |

`--cors` pode ser passado várias vezes:

    opencode serve --cors http://localhost:5173 --cors https://app.example.com

* * *

### [Autenticação](https://opencode.ai/docs/pt-br/server#autentica%C3%A7%C3%A3o)

Defina `OPENCODE_SERVER_PASSWORD` para proteger o servidor com autenticação básica HTTP. O nome de usuário padrão é `opencode`, ou defina `OPENCODE_SERVER_USERNAME` para substituí-lo. Isso se aplica tanto ao `opencode serve` quanto ao `opencode web`.

    OPENCODE_SERVER_PASSWORD=your-password opencode serve

* * *

### [Como funciona](https://opencode.ai/docs/pt-br/server#como-funciona)

Quando você executa `opencode`, ele inicia um TUI e um servidor. Onde o TUI é o cliente que se comunica com o servidor. O servidor expõe um endpoint de especificação OpenAPI 3.1. Este endpoint também é usado para gerar um [SDK](https://opencode.ai/docs/sdk)
.

Essa arquitetura permite que o opencode suporte múltiplos clientes e permite que você interaja com o opencode programaticamente.

Você pode executar `opencode serve` para iniciar um servidor autônomo. Se você tiver o TUI do opencode em execução, `opencode serve` iniciará um novo servidor.

* * *

#### [Conectar a um servidor existente](https://opencode.ai/docs/pt-br/server#conectar-a-um-servidor-existente)

Quando você inicia o TUI, ele atribui aleatoriamente uma porta e um nome de host. Você pode passar os [flags](https://opencode.ai/docs/cli)
 `--hostname` e `--port`. Em seguida, use isso para se conectar ao seu servidor.

O endpoint [`/tui`](https://opencode.ai/docs/pt-br/server#tui)
 pode ser usado para controlar o TUI através do servidor. Por exemplo, você pode preencher ou executar um prompt. Essa configuração é usada pelos plugins do opencode [IDE](https://opencode.ai/docs/ide)
.

* * *

[Especificação](https://opencode.ai/docs/pt-br/server#especifica%C3%A7%C3%A3o)

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

O servidor publica uma especificação OpenAPI 3.1 que pode ser visualizada em:

    http://<hostname>:<port>/doc

Por exemplo, `http://localhost:4096/doc`. Use a especificação para gerar clientes ou inspecionar tipos de requisição e resposta. Ou visualize em um explorador Swagger.

* * *

[APIs](https://opencode.ai/docs/pt-br/server#apis)

---------------------------------------------------

O servidor opencode expõe as seguintes APIs.

* * *

### [Global](https://opencode.ai/docs/pt-br/server#global)

| Método | Caminho | Descrição | Resposta |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `GET` | `/global/health` | Obter saúde e versão do servidor | `{ healthy: true, version: string }` |
| `GET` | `/global/event` | Obter eventos globais (fluxo SSE) | Fluxo de eventos |

* * *

### [Projeto](https://opencode.ai/docs/pt-br/server#projeto)

| Método | Caminho | Descrição | Resposta |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `GET` | `/project` | Listar todos os projetos | [`Project[]`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |
| `GET` | `/project/current` | Obter o projeto atual | [`Project`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |

* * *

### [Caminho & VCS](https://opencode.ai/docs/pt-br/server#caminho--vcs)

| Método | Caminho | Descrição | Resposta |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `GET` | `/path` | Obter o caminho atual | [`Path`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |
| `GET` | `/vcs` | Obter informações do VCS para o projeto atual | [`VcsInfo`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |

* * *

### [Instância](https://opencode.ai/docs/pt-br/server#inst%C3%A2ncia)

| Método | Caminho | Descrição | Resposta |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `POST` | `/instance/dispose` | Descartar a instância atual | `boolean` |

* * *

### [Configuração](https://opencode.ai/docs/pt-br/server#configura%C3%A7%C3%A3o)

| Método | Caminho | Descrição | Resposta |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `GET` | `/config` | Obter informações de configuração | [`Config`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |
| `PATCH` | `/config` | Atualizar configuração | [`Config`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |
| `GET` | `/config/providers` | Listar provedores e modelos padrão | `{ providers:` [Provider\[\]](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts)<br>`, default: { [key: string]: string } }` |

* * *

### [Provedor](https://opencode.ai/docs/pt-br/server#provedor)

| Método | Caminho | Descrição | Resposta |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `GET` | `/provider` | Listar todos os provedores | `{ all:` [Provider\[\]](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts)<br>`, default: {...}, connected: string[] }` |
| `GET` | `/provider/auth` | Obter métodos de autenticação do provedor | `{ [providerID: string]:` [ProviderAuthMethod\[\]](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts)<br> `}` |
| `POST` | `/provider/{id}/oauth/authorize` | Autorizar um provedor usando OAuth | [`ProviderAuthAuthorization`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |
| `POST` | `/provider/{id}/oauth/callback` | Lidar com o callback OAuth para um provedor | `boolean` |

* * *

### [Sessões](https://opencode.ai/docs/pt-br/server#sess%C3%B5es)

| Método | Caminho | Descrição | Notas |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `GET` | `/session` | Listar todas as sessões | Retorna [`Session[]`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |
| `POST` | `/session` | Criar uma nova sessão | corpo: `{ parentID?, title? }`, retorna [`Session`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |
| `GET` | `/session/status` | Obter status da sessão para todas as sessões | Retorna `{ [sessionID: string]:` [SessionStatus](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts)<br> `}` |
| `GET` | `/session/:id` | Obter detalhes da sessão | Retorna [`Session`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |
| `DELETE` | `/session/:id` | Deletar uma sessão e todos os seus dados | Retorna `boolean` |
| `PATCH` | `/session/:id` | Atualizar propriedades da sessão | corpo: `{ title? }`, retorna [`Session`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |
| `GET` | `/session/:id/children` | Obter as sessões filhas de uma sessão | Retorna [`Session[]`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |
| `GET` | `/session/:id/todo` | Obter a lista de tarefas para uma sessão | Retorna [`Todo[]`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |
| `POST` | `/session/:id/init` | Analisar o app e criar `AGENTS.md` | corpo: `{ messageID, providerID, modelID }`, retorna `boolean` |
| `POST` | `/session/:id/fork` | Fazer um fork de uma sessão existente em uma mensagem | corpo: `{ messageID? }`, retorna [`Session`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |
| `POST` | `/session/:id/abort` | Abortar uma sessão em execução | Retorna `boolean` |
| `POST` | `/session/:id/share` | Compartilhar uma sessão | Retorna [`Session`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |
| `DELETE` | `/session/:id/share` | Descompartilhar uma sessão | Retorna [`Session`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |
| `GET` | `/session/:id/diff` | Obter a diferença para esta sessão | query: `messageID?`, retorna [`FileDiff[]`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |
| `POST` | `/session/:id/summarize` | Resumir a sessão | corpo: `{ providerID, modelID }`, retorna `boolean` |
| `POST` | `/session/:id/revert` | Reverter uma mensagem | corpo: `{ messageID, partID? }`, retorna `boolean` |
| `POST` | `/session/:id/unrevert` | Restaurar todas as mensagens revertidas | Retorna `boolean` |
| `POST` | `/session/:id/permissions/:permissionID` | Responder a um pedido de permissão | corpo: `{ response, remember? }`, retorna `boolean` |

* * *

### [Mensagens](https://opencode.ai/docs/pt-br/server#mensagens)

| Método | Caminho | Descrição | Notas |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `GET` | `/session/:id/message` | Listar mensagens em uma sessão | query: `limit?`, retorna `{ info:` [Message](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts)<br>`, parts:` [Part\[\]](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts)<br>`}[]` |
| `POST` | `/session/:id/message` | Enviar uma mensagem e aguardar resposta | corpo: `{ messageID?, model?, agent?, noReply?, system?, tools?, parts }`, retorna `{ info:` [Message](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts)<br>`, parts:` [Part\[\]](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts)<br>`}` |
| `GET` | `/session/:id/message/:messageID` | Obter detalhes da mensagem | Retorna `{ info:` [Message](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts)<br>`, parts:` [Part\[\]](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts)<br>`}` |
| `POST` | `/session/:id/prompt_async` | Enviar uma mensagem assíncrona (sem espera) | corpo: igual a `/session/:id/message`, retorna `204 No Content` |
| `POST` | `/session/:id/command` | Executar um comando de barra | corpo: `{ messageID?, agent?, model?, command, arguments }`, retorna `{ info:` [Message](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts)<br>`, parts:` [Part\[\]](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts)<br>`}` |
| `POST` | `/session/:id/shell` | Executar um comando shell | corpo: `{ agent, model?, command }`, retorna `{ info:` [Message](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts)<br>`, parts:` [Part\[\]](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts)<br>`}` |

* * *

### [Comandos](https://opencode.ai/docs/pt-br/server#comandos)

| Método | Caminho | Descrição | Resposta |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `GET` | `/command` | Listar todos os comandos | [`Command[]`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |

* * *

### [Arquivos](https://opencode.ai/docs/pt-br/server#arquivos)

| Método | Caminho | Descrição | Resposta |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `GET` | `/find?pattern=<pat>` | Pesquisar texto em arquivos | Array de objetos de correspondência com `path`, `lines`, `line_number`, `absolute_offset`, `submatches` |
| `GET` | `/find/file?query=<q>` | Encontrar arquivos e diretórios por nome | `string[]` (caminhos) |
| `GET` | `/find/symbol?query=<q>` | Encontrar símbolos do workspace | [`Symbol[]`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |
| `GET` | `/file?path=<path>` | Listar arquivos e diretórios | [`FileNode[]`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |
| `GET` | `/file/content?path=<p>` | Ler um arquivo | [`FileContent`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |
| `GET` | `/file/status` | Obter status para arquivos rastreados | [`File[]`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |

#### [Parâmetros de consulta `/find/file`](https://opencode.ai/docs/pt-br/server#par%C3%A2metros-de-consulta-findfile)

*   `query` (obrigatório) — string de pesquisa (correspondência difusa)
*   `type` (opcional) — limitar resultados a `"file"` ou `"directory"`
*   `directory` (opcional) — substituir a raiz do projeto para a pesquisa
*   `limit` (opcional) — resultados máximos (1–200)
*   `dirs` (opcional) — flag legada (`"false"` retorna apenas arquivos)

* * *

### [Ferramentas (Experimental)](https://opencode.ai/docs/pt-br/server#ferramentas-experimental)

| Método | Caminho | Descrição | Resposta |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `GET` | `/experimental/tool/ids` | Listar todos os IDs de ferramentas | [`ToolIDs`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |
| `GET` | `/experimental/tool?provider=<p>&model=<m>` | Listar ferramentas com esquemas JSON para um modelo | [`ToolList`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |

* * *

### [LSP, Formatadores & MCP](https://opencode.ai/docs/pt-br/server#lsp-formatadores--mcp)

| Método | Caminho | Descrição | Resposta |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `GET` | `/lsp` | Obter status do servidor LSP | [`LSPStatus[]`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |
| `GET` | `/formatter` | Obter status do formatador | [`FormatterStatus[]`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |
| `GET` | `/mcp` | Obter status do servidor MCP | `{ [name: string]:` [MCPStatus](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts)<br> `}` |
| `POST` | `/mcp` | Adicionar servidor MCP dinamicamente | corpo: `{ name, config }`, retorna objeto de status MCP |

* * *

### [Agentes](https://opencode.ai/docs/pt-br/server#agentes)

| Método | Caminho | Descrição | Resposta |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `GET` | `/agent` | Listar todos os agentes disponíveis | [`Agent[]`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |

* * *

### [Registro](https://opencode.ai/docs/pt-br/server#registro)

| Método | Caminho | Descrição | Resposta |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `POST` | `/log` | Escrever entrada de log. Corpo: `{ service, level, message, extra? }` | `boolean` |

* * *

### [TUI](https://opencode.ai/docs/pt-br/server#tui)

| Método | Caminho | Descrição | Resposta |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `POST` | `/tui/append-prompt` | Anexar texto ao prompt | `boolean` |
| `POST` | `/tui/open-help` | Abrir o diálogo de ajuda | `boolean` |
| `POST` | `/tui/open-sessions` | Abrir o seletor de sessões | `boolean` |
| `POST` | `/tui/open-themes` | Abrir o seletor de temas | `boolean` |
| `POST` | `/tui/open-models` | Abrir o seletor de modelos | `boolean` |
| `POST` | `/tui/submit-prompt` | Enviar o prompt atual | `boolean` |
| `POST` | `/tui/clear-prompt` | Limpar o prompt | `boolean` |
| `POST` | `/tui/execute-command` | Executar um comando (`{ command }`) | `boolean` |
| `POST` | `/tui/show-toast` | Mostrar toast (`{ title?, message, variant }`) | `boolean` |
| `GET` | `/tui/control/next` | Aguardar o próximo pedido de controle | Objeto de pedido de controle |
| `POST` | `/tui/control/response` | Responder a um pedido de controle (`{ body }`) | `boolean` |

* * *

### [Auth](https://opencode.ai/docs/pt-br/server#auth)

| Método | Caminho | Descrição | Resposta |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `PUT` | `/auth/:id` | Definir credenciais de autenticação. O corpo deve corresponder ao esquema do provedor | `boolean` |

* * *

### [Eventos](https://opencode.ai/docs/pt-br/server#eventos)

| Método | Caminho | Descrição | Resposta |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `GET` | `/event` | Fluxo de eventos enviados pelo servidor. O primeiro evento é `server.connected`, depois eventos de bus | Fluxo de eventos enviados pelo servidor |

* * *

### [Docs](https://opencode.ai/docs/pt-br/server#docs)

| Método | Caminho | Descrição | Resposta |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `GET` | `/doc` | Especificação OpenAPI 3.1 | Página HTML com a especificação OpenAPI |

---

# Serwer | OpenCode

[Przejdź do głównej zawartości](https://opencode.ai/docs/pl/server#_top)

Serwer
======

Interakcja z serwerem opencode za pośrednictwem protokołu HTTP.

Komenda `opencode serve` uruchamia bezgłowy serwer HTTP, który udostępnia punkt końcowy OpenAPI, z którego może korzystać klient opencode.

* * *

### [Użycie](https://opencode.ai/docs/pl/server#u%C5%BCycie)

    opencode serve [--port <number>] [--hostname <string>] [--cors <origin>]

#### [Opcje](https://opencode.ai/docs/pl/server#opcje)

| Flaga | Opis | Domyślne |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `--port` | Port nasłuchiwania | `4096` |
| `--hostname` | Nazwa hosta do nasłuchiwania | `127.0.0.1` |
| `--mdns` | Włącz wykrywanie mDNS | `false` |
| `--mdns-domain` | Niestandardowa nazwa domeny dla usługi mDNS | `opencode.local` |
| `--cors` | Dodatkowe originy przeglądarki do dozwolenia | `[]` |

`--cors` można przekazać wiele razy:

    opencode serve --cors http://localhost:5173 --cors https://app.example.com

* * *

### [Uwierzytelnianie](https://opencode.ai/docs/pl/server#uwierzytelnianie)

Ustaw `OPENCODE_SERVER_PASSWORD`, aby chronić serwer za pomocą podstawowego uwierzytelniania HTTP. Domyślną nazwą użytkownika jest `opencode` lub ustaw `OPENCODE_SERVER_USERNAME`, aby ją zastąpić. Dotyczy to zarówno `opencode serve`, jak i `opencode web`.

    OPENCODE_SERVER_PASSWORD=your-password opencode serve

* * *

### [Jak to działa](https://opencode.ai/docs/pl/server#jak-to-dzia%C5%82a)

Kiedy uruchomisz `opencode`, uruchomi się TUI i serwer. Gdzie jest TUI klient komunikujący się z serwerem. Serwer udostępnia specyfikację OpenAPI 3.1 punkt końcowy. Ten punkt końcowy jest również używany do generowania [SDK](https://opencode.ai/docs/sdk)
.

Ta architektura umożliwia obsługę wielu klientów przez opencode i programową interakcję z kodem otwartym.

Możesz uruchomić `opencode serve`, aby uruchomić samodzielny serwer. Jeśli masz opencode TUI działa, `opencode serve` uruchomi nowy serwer.

* * *

#### [Połączenie z istniejącym serwerem](https://opencode.ai/docs/pl/server#po%C5%82%C4%85czenie-z-istniej%C4%85cym-serwerem)

Po uruchomieniu TUI losowo przypisuje port i nazwę hosta. Zamiast tego możesz przekazać `--hostname` i `--port` [flagi](https://opencode.ai/docs/cli)
. Następnie użyj tego, aby połączyć się z serwerem.

Punktu końcowego [`/tui`](https://opencode.ai/docs/pl/server#TUI)
 można użyć do sterowania TUI przez serwer. Można na przykład wstępnie wypełnić lub uruchomić monit. Ta konfiguracja jest używana przez wtyczki opencode [IDE](https://opencode.ai/docs/ide)
.

* * *

[Specyfikacja](https://opencode.ai/docs/pl/server#specyfikacja)

----------------------------------------------------------------

Serwer publikuje specyfikację OpenAPI 3.1, którą można obejrzeć pod adresem:

    http://<hostname>:<port>/doc

Na przykład `http://localhost:4096/doc`. Użyj specyfikacji, aby wygenerować klientów lub sprawdzić typy żądań i odpowiedzi. Możesz też wyświetlić go w eksploratorze Swagger.

* * *

[API](https://opencode.ai/docs/pl/server#api)

----------------------------------------------

Serwer opencode udostępnia następujące interfejsy API.

* * *

### [Globalne](https://opencode.ai/docs/pl/server#globalne)

| Method | Path | Description | Response |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `GET` | `/global/health` | Uzyskaj stan i wersję serwera | `{ healthy: true, version: string }` |
| `GET` | `/global/event` | Get global events (SSE stream) | Event stream |

* * *

### [Projekt](https://opencode.ai/docs/pl/server#projekt)

| Method | Path | Description | Response |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `GET` | `/project` | Lista wszystkich projektów | [`Project[]`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |
| `GET` | `/project/current` | Pobierz bieżący projekt | [`Project`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |

* * *

### [Ścieżka i VCS](https://opencode.ai/docs/pl/server#%C5%9Bcie%C5%BCka-i-vcs)

| Method | Path | Description | Response |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `GET` | `/path` | Pobierz bieżącą ścieżkę | [`Path`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |
| `GET` | `/vcs` | Uzyskaj informacje VCS dla bieżącego projektu | [`VcsInfo`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |

* * *

### [Instancja](https://opencode.ai/docs/pl/server#instancja)

| Method | Path | Description | Response |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `POST` | `/instance/dispose` | Usuń bieżącą instancję | `boolean` |

* * *

### [Konfiguracja](https://opencode.ai/docs/pl/server#konfiguracja)

| Method | Path | Description | Response |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `GET` | `/config` | Get config info | [`Config`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |
| `PATCH` | `/config` | Update config | [`Config`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |
| `GET` | `/config/providers` | Lista dostawców i modeli domyślnych | `{ providers:` [Dostawca\[\]](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts)<br>`, default: { [key: string]: string } }` |

* * *

### [Dostawca](https://opencode.ai/docs/pl/server#dostawca)

| Method | Path | Description | Response |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `GET` | `/provider` | Lista wszystkich dostawców | `{ all:` [Dostawca\[\]](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts)<br>`, default: {...}, connected: string[] }` |
| `GET` | `/provider/auth` | Uzyskaj metody uwierzytelniania dostawcy | `{ [providerID: string]:` [ProviderAuthMethod\[\]](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts)<br> `}` |
| `POST` | `/provider/{id}/oauth/authorize` | Autoryzuj dostawcę za pomocą protokołu OAuth | [`ProviderAuthAuthorization`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |
| `POST` | `/provider/{id}/oauth/callback` | Obsługa wywołania zwrotnego OAuth dla dostawcy | `boolean` |

* * *

### [Sesje](https://opencode.ai/docs/pl/server#sesje)

| Method | Path | Description | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `GET` | `/session` | Lista wszystkich sesji | Zwraca [`Session[]`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |
| `POST` | `/session` | Utwórz nową sesję | treść: `{ parentID?, title? }`, zwraca [`Session`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |
| `GET` | `/session/status` | Uzyskaj status sesji dla wszystkich sesji | Zwraca `{ [sessionID: string]:` [Status sesji](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts)<br> `}` |
| `GET` | `/session/:id` | Uzyskaj szczegóły sesji | Zwraca [`Session`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |
| `DELETE` | `/session/:id` | Usuń sesję i wszystkie jej dane | Zwraca `boolean` |
| `PATCH` | `/session/:id` | Aktualizuj właściwości sesji | treść: `{ title? }`, zwraca [`Session`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |
| `GET` | `/session/:id/children` | Pobierz sesje podrzędne sesji | Zwraca [`Session[]`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |
| `GET` | `/session/:id/todo` | Pobierz listę rzeczy do zrobienia dla sesji | Zwraca [`Todo[]`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |
| `POST` | `/session/:id/init` | Przeanalizuj aplikację i utwórz `AGENTS.md` | treść: `{ messageID, providerID, modelID }`, zwraca `boolean` |
| `POST` | `/session/:id/fork` | Rozwiń istniejącą sesję w wiadomości | treść: `{ messageID? }`, zwraca [`Session`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |
| `POST` | `/session/:id/abort` | Przerwij trwającą sesję | Zwraca `boolean` |
| `POST` | `/session/:id/share` | Udostępnij sesję | Zwraca [`Session`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |
| `DELETE` | `/session/:id/share` | Anuluj udostępnianie sesji | Zwraca [`Session`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |
| `GET` | `/session/:id/diff` | Pobierz różnicę dla tej sesji | zapytanie: `messageID?`, zwraca [`FileDiff[]`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |
| `POST` | `/session/:id/summarize` | Podsumuj sesję | treść: `{ providerID, modelID }`, zwraca `boolean` |
| `POST` | `/session/:id/revert` | Przywróć wiadomość | treść: `{ messageID, partID? }`, zwraca `boolean` |
| `POST` | `/session/:id/unrevert` | Przywróć wszystkie przywrócone wiadomości | Zwraca `boolean` |
| `POST` | `/session/:id/permissions/:permissionID` | Odpowiedz na prośbę o pozwolenie | treść: `{ response, remember? }`, zwraca `boolean` |

* * *

### [Wiadomości](https://opencode.ai/docs/pl/server#wiadomo%C5%9Bci)

| Method | Path | Description | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `GET` | `/session/:id/message` | Lista wiadomości w sesji | zapytanie: `limit?`, zwraca `{ info:` [Wiadomość](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts)<br>`, parts:` [Część\[\]](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts)<br>`}[]` |
| `POST` | `/session/:id/message` | Wyślij wiadomość i poczekaj na odpowiedź | treść: `{ messageID?, model?, agent?, noReply?, system?, tools?, parts }`, zwraca `{ info:` [Wiadomość](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts)<br>`, parts:` [Część\[\]](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts)<br>`}` |
| `GET` | `/session/:id/message/:messageID` | Uzyskaj szczegóły wiadomości | Zwraca `{ info:` [Wiadomość](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts)<br>`, parts:` [Część\[\]](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts)<br>`}` |
| `POST` | `/session/:id/prompt_async` | Wyślij wiadomość asynchronicznie (bez czekania) | treść: taka sama jak `/session/:id/message`, zwraca `204 No Content` |
| `POST` | `/session/:id/command` | Wykonaj slash command | treść: `{ messageID?, agent?, model?, command, arguments }`, zwraca `{ info:` [Wiadomość](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts)<br>`, parts:` [Część\[\]](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts)<br>`}` |
| `POST` | `/session/:id/shell` | Uruchom polecenie shell | treść: `{ agent, model?, command }`, zwraca `{ info:` [Wiadomość](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts)<br>`, parts:` [Część\[\]](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts)<br>`}` |

* * *

### [Polecenia](https://opencode.ai/docs/pl/server#polecenia)

| Metoda | Ścieżka | Opis | Odpowiedź |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `GET` | `/command` | Lista wszystkich poleceń | [`Command[]`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |

* * *

### [Pliki](https://opencode.ai/docs/pl/server#pliki)

| Method | Path | Description | Response |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `GET` | `/find?pattern=<pat>` | Szukaj tekstu w plikach | Tablica obiektów dopasowania z `path`, `lines`, `line_number`, `absolute_offset`, `submatches` |
| `GET` | `/find/file?query=<q>` | Znajdź pliki i katalogi według nazwy | `string[]` (ścieżki) |
| `GET` | `/find/symbol?query=<q>` | Find workspace symbols | [`Symbol[]`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |
| `GET` | `/file?path=<path>` | Lista plików i katalogów | [`FileNode[]`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |
| `GET` | `/file/content?path=<p>` | Read a file | [`FileContent`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |
| `GET` | `/file/status` | Uzyskaj status śledzonych plików | [`File[]`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |

#### [`/find/file` query parameters](https://opencode.ai/docs/pl/server#findfile-query-parameters)

*   `query` (required) — search string (fuzzy match)
*   `type` (optional) — limit results to `"file"` or `"directory"`
*   `directory` (opcjonalnie) — zastąp katalog główny projektu dla wyszukiwania
*   `limit` (optional) — max results (1–200)
*   `dirs` (optional) — legacy flag (`"false"` returns only files)

* * *

### [Narzędzia (Eksperymentalne)](https://opencode.ai/docs/pl/server#narz%C4%99dzia-eksperymentalne)

| Method | Path | Description | Response |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `GET` | `/experimental/tool/ids` | Lista wszystkich identyfikatorów narzędzi | [`ToolIDs`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |
| `GET` | `/experimental/tool?provider=<p>&model=<m>` | Lista narzędzi ze schematami JSON dla modelu | [`ToolList`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |

* * *

### [LSP, Formatery i MCP](https://opencode.ai/docs/pl/server#lsp-formatery-i-mcp)

| Method | Path | Description | Response |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `GET` | `/lsp` | Uzyskaj status serwera LSP | [`LSPStatus[]`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |
| `GET` | `/formatter` | Get formatter status | [`FormatterStatus[]`](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts) |
| `GET` | `/mcp` | Uzyskaj status serwera MCP | `{ [name: string]:` [MCPStatus](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts)<br> `}` |
| `POST` | `/mcp` | Dodaj dynamicznie serwer MCP | treść: `{ name, config }`, zwraca obiekt stanu MCP |

* * *
